allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=[s for s in d['streams'] if s['codec_type']=='video'][0]; print\(f\\"Duration: {v.get\('duration','?'\)}s, FPS: {v.get\('r_frame_rate','?'\)}, Size: {v.get\('width'\)}x{v.get\('height'\)}\\"\)")
